# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that accepts custom build commands as workflow inputs. Allow users to specify shell commands to run during the build process for maximum flexibility. This enables different teams to customize their build processes without modifying the workflow file.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Custom Build Workflow

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      pre_build_commands:
        description: 'Commands to run before the build'
        required: false
        type: string
        default: ''
      build_commands:
        description: 'Main build commands'
        required: true
        type: string
      post_build_commands:
        description: 'Commands to run after the build'
        required: false
        type: string
        default: ''
      working_directory:
        description: 'Working directory for build commands'
        required: false
        type: string
        default: '.'
      shell_type:
        description: 'Shell to use for executing commands'
        required: false
        type: choice
        options:
          - bash
          - sh
          - pwsh
          - python
        default: 'bash'
      node_version:
        description: 'Node.js version (leave empty to skip)'
        required: false
        type: string
        default: ''
      python_version:
        description: 'Python version (leave empty to skip)'
        required: false
        type: string
        default: ''
      java_version:
        description: 'Java version (leave empty to skip)'
        required: false
        type: string
        default: ''
      go_version:
        description: 'Go version (leave empty to skip)'
        required: false
        type: string
        default: ''
      install_dependencies:
        description: 'Install dependencies command'
        required: false
        type: string
        default: ''
      environment_variables:
        description: 'Environment variables (JSON format: {"KEY":"value"})'
        required: false
        type: string
        default: '{}'
      upload_artifacts:
        description: 'Upload build artifacts'
        required: false
        type: boolean
        default: false
      artifact_path:
        description: 'Path to artifacts to upload'
        required: false
        type: string
        default: 'build/'
      artifact_name:
        description: 'Name for the uploaded artifact'
        required: false
        type: string
        default: 'build-artifact'
      timeout_minutes:
        description: 'Job timeout in minutes'
        required: false
        type: number
        default: 30
      runs_on:
        description: 'Runner to use'
        required: false
        type: choice
        options:
          - ubuntu-latest
          - ubuntu-22.04
          - ubuntu-20.04
          - windows-latest
          - macos-latest
          - macos-13
        default: 'ubuntu-latest'

jobs:
  custom-build:
    name: Custom Build
    runs-on: ${{ inputs.runs_on }}
    timeout-minutes: ${{ fromJSON(inputs.timeout_minutes) }}
    
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Node.js
        if: inputs.node_version != ''
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ inputs.node_version }}

      - name: Setup Python
        if: inputs.python_version != ''
        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: ${{ inputs.python_version }}

      - name: Setup Java
        if: inputs.java_version != ''
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          distribution: 'temurin'
          java-version: ${{ inputs.java_version }}

      - name: Setup Go
        if: inputs.go_version != ''
        uses: actions/setup-go@v5
        with:
          go-version: ${{ inputs.go_version }}

      - name: Parse environment variables
        id: parse-env
        shell: bash
        run: |
          echo "Parsing environment variables..."
          echo '${{ inputs.environment_variables }}' > env_vars.json
          cat env_vars.json

      - name: Install dependencies
        if: inputs.install_dependencies != ''
        shell: ${{ inputs.shell_type }}
        working-directory: ${{ inputs.working_directory }}
        run: ${{ inputs.install_dependencies }}
        env:
          ENV_VARS: ${{ inputs.environment_variables }}

      - name: Pre-build commands
        if: inputs.pre_build_commands != ''
        shell: ${{ inputs.shell_type }}
        working-directory: ${{ inputs.working_directory }}
        run: ${{ inputs.pre_build_commands }}
        env:
          ENV_VARS: ${{ inputs.environment_variables }}

      - name: Execute build commands
        shell: ${{ inputs.shell_type }}
        working-directory: ${{ inputs.working_directory }}
        run: ${{ inputs.build_commands }}
        env:
          ENV_VARS: ${{ inputs.environment_variables }}

      - name: Post-build commands
        if: inputs.post_build_commands != ''
        shell: ${{ inputs.shell_type }}
        working-directory: ${{ inputs.working_directory }}
        run: ${{ inputs.post_build_commands }}
        env:
          ENV_VARS: ${{ inputs.environment_variables }}

      - name: Upload build artifacts
        if: inputs.upload_artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: ${{ inputs.artifact_name }}
          path: ${{ inputs.artifact_path }}
          retention-days: 7
